hero.title: Your Peaceful Stay Near Queen Elizabeth National Park
hero.subtitle: Welcome to Latitude Zero Cottages Kikorongo — a comfortable, relaxing getaway surrounded by the natural beauty of Kikorongo. Whether you are here for a safari, a romantic escape, or a quiet retreat, we offer warm hospitality, delicious meals, and a place to truly unwind.
hero.tagline: Comfortable Cottages. Delicious Meals. Natural Surroundings. Warm Hospitality.
hero.meta_title: Latitude Zero Cottages Kikorongo | Comfortable Rooms Near Queen Elizabeth National Park
hero.meta_description: Latitude Zero Cottages Kikorongo offers comfortable accommodation, spacious rooms, delicious local and international meals, refreshing drinks, 24/7 internet connection, and warm hospitality near Queen Elizabeth National Park.

contact.address: Kikorongo, near Queen Elizabeth National Park

footer.copyright: © 2026 Latitude Zero Cottages Kikorongo. All rights reserved.

testimonials.text: Absolutely wonderful stay! The staff were incredibly welcoming and the cottages are beautifully maintained. Woke up to birds singing and fell asleep to the sounds of nature. Will definitely come back!
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.text: Best lodge experience in Uganda. Clean, comfortable, and the food was excellent. Very close to Queen Elizabeth National Park — perfect for our safari adventures.
testimonials.author: James K.

testimonials.text: A peaceful retreat with amazing hospitality. The team went above and beyond to make our anniversary special. Highly recommended for couples!
testimonials.author: Anna & Peter
